latestResolutionPolicy: Do not discover latest branches dynamically.
Address truth comes from governor-scripts when a governor key is declared.
Non-governor addresses must be explicitly fixed in this catalog.
Current implementation targets must come from an explicit authority rule or proxy runtime metadata.
Historical groups may use explicit governor-key series only when the family is explicitly authorized here.
